title: CCL - Close/reopen the tab and the settings screen
scenario: CCL (Call Control Lock) setting persists when closing and reopening the Advanced tab in Device Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the desired Poly device to open Device Settings.
Locate the Call Control Lock (CCL) toggle and set it to ON (or OFF, as desired).
Close the Advanced tab by tapping the back arrow or navigating away (e.g., go to Home or another settings screen).
Re-open Device Settings → Audio Settings → Advanced.
Observe the state of the Call Control Lock toggle.
Navigate away from the Advanced screen again (e.g., go to Home or another settings screen).
Return to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Advanced.
Observe the state of the Call Control Lock toggle again.
expected: The Call Control Lock (CCL) setting persists in the same state (ON or OFF) each time the Advanced tab is closed and reopened, and when navigating away and back to the Advanced settings screen.
